attacking_style: Primarily attacks for KOM points or in breakaways rather than stage wins, showing tactical discipline in domestique role. Survives in breaks until final kilometer but rarely contests finish.
team_tactics: Deployed as high-powered domestique for GC leaders, executing controlled chase pacing and mountain leadout work. Sacrifices personal results to protect team leaders, even when wearing national champion jersey.
terrain_preference: Time trials and moderate mountain stages suit best (5th on Jebel Hafeet). Extended steep climbing and mountain finishes with GC-level sustained gradients expose limitations despite solid climbing capacity.
vulnerability: Loses positions on final steep kilometers of extended mountain stages when GC contenders accelerate. TTer physiology struggles when sustained climbing intensity required, evidenced by losing podium by 1 second after conservative UAE Tour ride.
key_patterns: Executes team pacing duties over personal ambitions, even wearing Australian road champion jersey (2 instances)
Strong on moderate climbs but vulnerable final kilometers of mountain stages (3 observations UAE Tour)
Breakaway participation for KOM points or team tactics, survival to final km without contesting win
Calibrated chase/leadout pacing protects GC riders while limiting own energy expenditure (2 instances)
TTer with genuine climbing capacity (5th Hafeet) but not elite sustained steep gradient performance
form_trajectory: neutral: Shows consistent domestique execution across 2022-2023 but UAE Tour podium loss by 1 second suggests ceiling reached in GC climbing. Role solidified as high-level support rider rather than personal GC threat.
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 21
